result: Existing completion flow had verification and policy contracts but no source-traced acceptance contract gate.
New validator and CLI gate pass for the active contract; structure/runtime/control harness validators recognize the new artifacts.
Changed validate*.py references in acceptance evidence now require independentEvidence.
Runtime-only .codex-memory/ and .pfo/ artifact references no longer require committed files in clean GitHub Actions checkout.
Identified v1 token-level implementation gaps and converted them into behavior-level runtime contracts.
O1-O9 validator and representative CLI commands passed locally.
Critical changes now require independent reviewer runtime; policy events preserve actor usage session_state and result; dispatch can create independent worktrees.
